scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:module && npm run build:cjs && npm run build:types
scripts.version:update: npm version ${npm_config_type:-minor} --no-git-tag-version && npx @biomejs/biome format --write package.json && git add package.json package-lock.json && git commit -m "⬆️ Updating version"
scripts.version:dev: npm version pre${npm_config_type:-release} --preid=${npm_config_tag:-dev} --no-git-tag-version && npx @biomejs/biome format --write package.json
scripts.publish:dev: npm run version:dev --type=${npm_config_type:-release} --tag=${npm_config_tag:-dev} && npm run build && npm publish --tag ${npm_config_tag:-dev}
scripts.publish:github: npm run tag:current && npm run tag:push
